internal_issues.description: WIN-016 detail_verdict_text contained boilerplate live-fetch-call sentence inapplicable to WIN-016 (has no live fetch). Source: WIN-016.c5.json holes[0].

suggested_patch.find: the hardcoded expected value sits in the same commit as the live fetch call, making even that weaker test unverifiable.
suggested_patch.replace: There is no live fetch call here at all — WIN-016 appears only as a one-line static entry in the dome WIN registry — so even the nominal test that would check the hardcoded value against a live fetch is absent. The sole verification is the dome author asserting the calculation matches.
